email._comment_provider: imap = Gmail catch-all | exzork = mailer.exzork.me (wildcard MX). Prefer env EXZORK_API_KEY over config key.

browser._comment_reset: hard = kill+relaunch browser per account (clean cookies). soft = reuse process. google mode defaults hard. Env: GROK_BROWSER_RESET=hard|soft

account._comment_password: Fixed password for ALL farmed accounts (not random). Override with env GROK_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD. Saved to accounts/email_pass.txt + accounts/accounts.jsonl

grok_cli._comment_oauth_mode: auto = PKCE on Camoufox, device SSO on Chromium (no :56121 lock). pkce | device | auto. Force Chromium PKCE: GROK_FORCE_CHROMIUM_PKCE=1
grok_cli._comment_oauth_referrer: grok-build = Grok Build / 9router grok-cli (default). cli-proxy-api = free CLI proxy style (grok-sgb). Different JWT claims / product surface.
grok_cli._comment_activate: Visit grok.com with SSO before OAuth (replaces idle bot-hygiene sleep). Reduces later 402/403. Env: GROK_ACTIVATE_GROK_COM=0 to disable.
grok_cli._comment_settle: Bot-hygiene idle AFTER activate_grok_com (default 12s). Set 0 to skip. Env path: convert_grok_cli_tokens.
grok_cli._comment_inject_policy: usable: probe chat — 2xx inject ON, 402/403 inject OFF, 400 skip. all: always inject ON if tokens.
